place: Plai Laem, Bophut, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Twelve-Bedroom Beachfront Estate, Plai Laem
note: Whole estate · book all four villas
blurb: The entire gated estate — four architect-designed villas totalling twelve bedrooms, two beachfront and two elevated for sea views, sharing a private white-sand beach, a full gym and kayaks. Built for weddings, retreats and multi-family gatherings.
detail:
Take over the whole estate: four brand-new, architect-designed villas in an exclusive gated community on Plai Laem, sharing a private white-sand beach with 24-hour security. Two villas sit directly on the beach with steps to the sand, and two are elevated on the terrace above for sweeping 180-degree sea views — together they hold twelve queen bedrooms (each convertible for extra guests) and comfortably sleep up to 24 adults plus children.

Every villa has its own full-width infinity pool, a great room with seating for ten, a full kitchen and designer interiors, while the estate shares a fully equipped gym, kayaks on the beach and beautifully landscaped gardens. The scale and layout make it ideal for weddings, corporate retreats, wellness groups and large multi-family holidays — gather everyone together or give each family its own private villa.

The stay is fully serviced: daily cleaning and turndown, breakfast made to order each morning, complimentary airport transfers, all linens and towers, and an on-demand concierge and personal experience manager to plan activities, restaurants and events. Private chefs, in-villa massage and a low-cost private shuttle are available on request — an effortless, celebratory beachfront takeover on Koh Samui's north-east coast.
